sources.claim: Global social commerce market valued at $2.11 trillion in 2026, growing at 29.12% CAGR to $7.55T by 2031
Social Commerce Market $1,925.3 billion in 2026, CAGR 37.4% through 2033; global market projected at $8.5T by 2030
TikTok Shop $23.4B US GMV, $87B globally in 2026; 4.7% conversion rate vs Instagram 2.1%
US social commerce crosses $100B for first time in 2026 (up 48% YoY); Amazon Rufus expanding to social platforms; 46.8M Instagram shoppers in US
Meta preparing AI shopping agents for Instagram to rival TikTok Shop, 2026
60%+ product discovery on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube; 62% of social shoppers cite creator content as decisive for purchase
Live commerce hitting 42% YoY growth; live sessions convert at 12-18%; TikTok Shop grew 407% in 2024; live stream average conversion 12-18%
Creator deals tied to sales see 4-8× ROAS vs flat-fee models; AI-powered storefronts reshape personalization
US social commerce intelligence report: $1.81T market by 2031, led by TikTok Shop, YouTube Shopping, Pinterest
AI and social commerce ecosystems: algorithmic fairness, data privacy, and governance are central concerns as recommendation AI scales
Social commerce global revenue 2020-2030; 2021 baseline ~$492-620B establishing 5Y growth baseline
Amazon Rufus generated $12B in incremental ecommerce value in 2025; expanding to social commerce integrations in 2026

notes: Platform market share percentages (TikTok ~20% US, Meta ~35% US) are sourced from ringly.io statistics compilation; exact figures vary by research methodology.
Global market size estimates range from $1.9T (Grand View Research) to $2.6T (other sources) in 2026 — variations reflect scope definitions (some include China's WeChat/Douyin natively).
5Y growth of +240% calculated from ~$620B global baseline in 2021 (Statista/Straits Research) to $2.1T in 2026 (Mordor Intelligence).
Live commerce conversion rates (12-18%) refer specifically to managed live shopping events, not passive shoppable video.
